raw_response_text:
<explanation>
The query image shows a black fabric with multicolored dots of various sizes. This pattern of multicolored dots is most similar to the image labeled as 10, which also features a background covered in multicolored dots. Although the background color of the query image is black, whereas the example image labeled 10 has a pink background, the dot pattern is a key distinguishing feature. The images labeled 45 and 19 do not feature dot patterns, so they can be ruled out.
</explanation>

<response>10</response>

raw_response_text:
<explanation>
The Query Image shows a metallic object with multiple interlocking loops. This pattern of interlocking loops is most similar to the image labeled as 19, which also features an intricate pattern of connected loops. The Query Image does not resemble the image labeled as 45, which shows a wrinkled surface, nor does it resemble the image labeled as 10, which features a pink surface with colorful polka dots.
</explanation>

<response>19</response>
